name: DEMENTIA WITH LEWY BODIES
definition: 2nd most common neurodegenerative disorder in patients > 65 years

demographics.Histo: loss of dopaminergic neurons in substantia nigra

dominant_finding: ± involvement of occipital lobes (spared in Alzheimer's)
distribution: hypometabolism in both parietal + posterior temporal lobes and posterior cingulate gyrus
discriminating_features: hypometabolism in both parietal + posterior temporal lobes and posterior cingulate gyrus
± involvement of occipital lobes (spared in Alzheimer's)

PET: hypometabolism in both parietal + posterior temporal lobes and posterior cingulate gyrus
± involvement of occipital lobes (spared in Alzheimer's)
